Name: Git - Create Pull Request
Description: Create a Pull or Merge Request for the repository

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Repo.Url
Parameters.Label: Git Repository URL
Parameters.HelpText: The URL used for the `git clone` operation.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.User.Name
Parameters.Label: Git Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username of the credentials to use to log into git.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Source.Branch
Parameters.Label: Source Branch
Parameters.HelpText: The source branch name to compare the repository with.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Destination.Branch
Parameters.Label: Destination Branch
Parameters.HelpText: The destination branch to create the pull/merge request against.

Parameters.Name: Template.Git.Repository.Technology
Parameters.Label: Source Control Technology
Parameters.HelpText: Select which source control technology to create the request on.
